## **Review Themes** {#review-themes}

### MyFitnessPal: Diário alimentar {#review-app-1}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      6 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 6, 2026 - Jul 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Ted Manuer_, Jul 20, 2026, 1/5: "App freezes. Wont even open most of the time. Freezes on opening logo. Used to be great, not sure what's wrong."
            2. _Rebekah Holt_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "App has become entirely unusable and seems to have spontaneously forgotten my account, now I can't log in or use it. It seems they've also locked the barcode scanner behind a pay wall, which definitely puts me off using it even if I do manage to regain access to my account! I used to recommend this to my friends, but I'll be warning them all to avoid now."
            3. _Ldycsi_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "Last update made it glitchy, slow, and can’t search for foods. Have to add everything. Useless unless you pay them. I’ve been using the app for years. I felt loyal to it bc I dropped a ton of weight and got healthy with this as a tool. That’s over, I guess. What a pain in my a— it has become to log things! No thanks. I’ll find something else that isn’t seeking money people do not have to waste on a logging app that has ads! How much do you greedy b—ds need?!"

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      5 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 10, 2026 - Jul 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _N.Schn_, Jul 20, 2026, 1/5: "Updated app about a week ago and the new interface is unintuitive, clunky, and a massive downgrade from the streamlined interface that we’ve had for years. It’s bad enough I’ve cancelled my premium and am looking for alternatives."
            2. _Nathannn98_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "You might have a fine experience with this app, but mine only worked for a day. I had the free trial and then was set to renew, so I had the premium. First day it worked fine (searching food/barcodes etc) but then next morning it only allowed me to add food through manual entry, didn’t let me search existing brands etc (only options were history and my meals/food or to add manually). App still showed I had premium. I tried to contact support but the bot was zero help. No way to talk to a human except to ‘submit feedback’. I did, but no way to get a timely reply. After that I thought maybe try to delete/redownload the app, but when I downloaded again and tried to sign in, it said my account wasn’t found (I signed up using Apple ID and system let me autofill my login using Apple) definitely cancelling my free trial. Very frustrating since I was really excited to use it again today and track my meals. Gonna have to go to a competitor probably."
            3. _TROOPER685HD_, Jul 10, 2026, 2/5: "I have no idea who came up with the idea of ​​putting the barcode scanner behind a paywall (premium), but that makes the app useless"

   **Ads pressure.**
      1 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 11, 2026 - Jul 11, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Sht:6)!&8((,(&8svifghik_, Jul 11, 2026, 3/5: "Calorie goal increases without notice. Page jumps around when going to press buttons when intrusive ads load in on fast WiFi."
---

### Strava: corrida, pedal, trilha {#review-app-2}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Jay_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "The app has made it impossible to login. After entering your email, there's no option to use your password. You get emailed a 6 digit code.... That doesn't work. After double, triple checking the code matches the email sent. Nope. "PLEASE TRY AGAIN WITH A NEW CODE." This has been an issue for several months. Very embarassing to see from a company as large as Strava. Two thumbs down 👎"
            2. _Tom B_, Jul 19, 2026, 2/5: "The app seems to have an issue that causes it to crash when the native camera app is used. With Strava running in the background you don't know it's crashed and stopped tracking. Phone is Pixel 10"

   **Pricing and paywall.**

      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

### BetterMe: Health Coaching {#review-app-3}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      5 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 23, 2026 - Jul 21, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _globe_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "app keeps crashing even after clearing cache, uninstalling and reinstalling the app"
            2. _Lijindev Keloth_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "Hey team, I have decided to leave this app even though my plan is still active. Your app has been testing my patience and the support given is also of no help. Every time I start working out with a lot of focus the app either app slows down or crashes , thus keeping away from my routine. There is no point in trusting this app even if it works for a day or two. Any day it can take a U-turn. this app is a good example of how an app can go from the best to the worst ( for me )."
            3. _Sabina Kotiranta_, May 23, 2026, 1/5: "would be nice if it stops crashing.... Reinstalled it twice now."

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      4 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 2, 2026 - Jul 21, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Ana K_, Jul 21, 2026, 1/5: "Red flag: Cancelling the subscription is very frustrating! I'm still trying to do it. You can't cancel it within the app, support points you to a non-existing item on the menu, and so on. The app itself has lots of workouts but there is no way to save favourites or find the ones you liked (descriptions are useless and they all look alike)... NOT a good experience."
            2. _I L_, Jul 14, 2026, 1/5: "i cancelled before the end of the trial period and I was charged anyway. When I contacted them, they said they could find my account. wow."
            3. _Ein Google-Nutzer_, Jun 2, 2026, 1/5: "this is a close to a scam... be aware that you only cancel the subscription after x-times having to confirm in the process and the again via email separately.. again. only then you are off the hook. (by the way, gets waaay cheaper if you cancel it)"

### Strava: corre, camina, pedalea {#review-app-4}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      6 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 22, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _kanga66x_, Jun 22, 2026, 1/5: "Constantly crashes, doesn’t record skiing properly, ie, includes time on lifts as part of achievements…."
            2. _Greg contadino_, May 22, 2026, 1/5: "There is no need to say much about this app, the rest of the reviews speak for themselves. I'm reporting a bug to the developers which apparently also affects some Android users, so I assume it's related to the servers but I don't know. I haven't been able to use the app in any way for a few weeks, maybe more than a month. I open it and it starts loading endlessly without loading any section, from the home page to the workouts. I've tried uninstalling and reinstalling it, updating the iPhone, logging in from the iPad but nothing seems to work, and it's not a network problem. I will change my rating if you resolve this, thanks"
            3. _jeanpierre065_, May 25, 2026, 3/5: "I am a paying subscriber and what tires me is this application which has a bug when it comes to route tracing, because often when we run, we run on paths that are not represented on Strava, so we are forced to trace in manual mode, but often the manual goes back to automatic whether on the application or on the web version, we don't know why and it's really annoying this bug in manual mode I would like to be able to trace on paths which do not exist on your map. I would also add that the AI ​​is completely gimmicky and is of no use because it does not take the extended context, over 6 months for example. THANKS"

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      3 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: May 19, 2026 - Jul 12, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Gmd5_, Jul 12, 2026, 1/5: "Does NOT functionally integrate with apple watch so it is useless for what I need. It claims integration, but this integration does not work reliably. I need my apps to work reliably so subscription cancelled. App deleted after third failure in three days. Cheap & shoddy ai coding using models trained on non apple phones."
            2. _DocMucki_, Jun 28, 2026, 1/5: "It just stoped. It now just shows „something went wrong“. I can use the website but the app does not work for me anymore. Canceled my subscription. Reinstalling the app or restarting the phone doesn’t help."
            3. _Labenwolf_, Jun 16, 2026, 1/5: "In the app, advertising for a Pro subscription is pushed onto you more and more aggressively than in some Chinese apps. All relevant functions are hidden behind this paywall, so they are not an asset for athletes."
---

### Lose It! – Calorie Counter {#review-app-5}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Mar 1, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _The Real Jetlag_, Mar 26, 2026, 2/5: "Recently redownloaded this app to track my protein intake and the app just crashes almost every time try to log a meal."
            2. _soccergirl25_, Jul 17, 2026, 4/5: "I’ve used this app off and on for the better part of 15 years. It’s consistently the best one I have used. Best user interface, scanning ability, etc. However, for about the last 6 months any time I try to switch between “my meals” and adding individual foods to my current meal, the app freezes. Every time, without fail. It is quite annoying that this has been working fine and then the design of the app changed just a bit and now that feature may as well not exist. I’m also not a fan of how the previous meals tab looks compared to how it has in the past. I wish it went in reverse chronological order like it used to instead of in “day” order from breakfast to dinner. It’s too cluttered with not enough separation on that page and makes it impossible for me to find what I’m looking for. I may as well just re-add everything between the design change and the inability to switch between the meals and individual foods add tabs. Again, still the best app out there. But it has slipped some recently and I wish they would leave good enough alone!"

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      5 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Mar 25, 2026 - Jul 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Sean77408_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "Used to be my favorite app, but now you have to pay for premium to use the scan feature. Tired of companies taking away features we used to have for free and making us pay. Will no longer be using this app."
            2. _Swest808_, Jul 16, 2026, 1/5: "Instructions to cancel free trial are terrible. Got charged & still can’t get it cancelled."
            3. _pavpou_, Jul 14, 2026, 1/5: "There is no way you can evaluate a weight loss app in only 7 days. You need at least 1 month. The app is subscription based. As in, you need a subscription to use it at all. This is not communicated when you first join. They take you through a long onboarding process and only at the end you are told that there you need to pay. Waste of time."

### Fitbod: Rutinas Personalizadas {#review-app-6}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 11, 2026 - Jul 3, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Hassan_, May 11, 2026, 1/5: "I encounter a significant bug in the Fitbod calendar. Even if my 4/4 objective is achieved, the bad sessions appear as completed. Targeted exercises and the “max effort” phase also seem bugged. Support has not provided any real solution for several days. I was only asked to uninstall/reinstall the app, which is frustrating for a paid app. I'm paying for a reliable app, not for having to fix bugs myself."
            2. _Lord Mute_, Jul 3, 2026, 2/5: "App is glitchy whenever you have a music engine like Spotify play in the background. Consistently has shown to have malfunctioning timers that quit after locking your phone. Record keeping is frustrating to correct and update suggested weights for workouts. Overall, this app is not worth the subscription rate it charges. It is mediocre at best and discouraging at worst."

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      6 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 20, 2026 - Jul 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

            2. _Sarah Roberson_, Jul 6, 2026, 3/5: "Looks like it woulda been great. Took the time to fill everything out then couldn't proceed without accepting a free 7 day trial. Meaning I'll have to pay later. Wish that transparency was up front so I didn't waste my time filling everything out. I don't like having to give my information, then surprise... can't have it without paying. Feels untrustworthy to give money. Knowing up front - I know what I'm getting into."

### Runna: Allenamento Corsa {#review-app-7}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 7, 2026 - Jul 3, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Steveg1979_, Jul 3, 2026, 1/5: "I found the app buggy, for example it would randomly not allow me to start recording a run even after restarting the app. Synching issues with Strave. Calories burned data was inaccurate, in one case I burned less calories in a 10k run than a 7k run! Message support and you get the scripted answer of check latest version of the app; data signal blah blah with no further help. Gave up and went onto Strava paid version."
            2. _zuba_7_, Jun 28, 2026, 1/5: "I asked many times how can I fix this issue but the app still doesn't work and keeps telling me to run to a certain pace even if I clearly cannot due to the temperature of Rome rising day by day."
            3. _Calum7282_, Jun 4, 2026, 1/5: "App was good but now during workouts it reduces the sound of any music app or YouTube to a whisper which makes it almost unusable. If you try to refresh the app to fix it then it changes how far you’ve ran and there isn’t a way to edit this at the end."

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      4 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 1, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

            2. _Twatwagon_, Jul 14, 2026, 2/5: "I’ve been using Runna on and off for a year-ish. I’m accident prone but genuinely found the return to running plan to be the best plan for me. I’m finally injury free so decided to try again only to find anything after week 1 for ANY run now hidden behind a paywall?? I already pay for Strava, I’m not paying £100 for a year when there are free alternatives. Absolute joke."

### Yazio: Contador de calorias {#review-app-8}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      5 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 26, 2026 - Jul 11, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Cam_Cam._, Jun 29, 2026, 2/5: "I've been using it for 2 years with 600flammes but it's been bugging for 2 weeks so I uninstalled it but now it doesn't want to reopen, it leaves the app on its own and I'm going to lose my flames this evening!"
            2. _nyc driver 1234_, Jul 11, 2026, 4/5: "I use this app to lose weight after an operation. It’s helpful ! Some improvement and bug fix: - connected apps: active calories from iOS health cannot be deleted and disconnecting doesn’t work consistently, garmin connect imports total calories instead of active calories of sport - when item not found: use AI to take picture or nutrition label instead of manual import, manual imports are annoying - data shown: filter by nutritional information like calories and protein to know which foods to eat / avoid. Even some labeling / color score or “diet list” Could be useful"
            3. __MarkCard__, Jul 8, 2026, 4/5: "Excellent app, intuitive and reliable. It does what it promises and the micro-bugs found are negligible. However, I would like to see more in-depth KPIs and statistics, the possibility of viewing the time of entering meals and activities and, above all, greater customization of the food diary. It would be very useful to be able to create or rename meals (e.g. breakfast, morning snack, lunch, afternoon snack, dinner and evening snack), instead of being limited to a fixed structure. With these improvements it would easily become a 5 star app."

   **Ads pressure.**
      1 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 1, 2026 - Jul 1, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _langustarews_, Jul 1, 2026, 1/5: "Im reviewing the free version only, usually I like to check if I like the app enough to pay for the pro version. Well, I didn’t get to that point because the amount of ads they throw at you at every step is making it impossible to try."

### Fitness App (ABC Trainerize) {#review-app-9}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      5 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jan 29, 2026 - Jun 25, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _bshwbdidn_, Jun 16, 2026, 1/5: "Ever since ABC bought out trainerize it’s been downhill from there They push the glitz and glam upgrades and AI tools (which quite frankly are of no real use for a non cookie cutter coaching service) But then have absolutely zero interest in making sure their platform actually works. Always glitched, always app crashes and never any true accountability I’ve been on multiple calls and email exchanges to be reassured that things would get better. It’s been over a year of this now and my patience is gone. I’ll be transferring my client base elsewhere and would not recommend this to any coach looking to keep their name in good standings with their client base."
            2. _trkevig_, Mar 3, 2026, 1/5: "Trainerize used to be spot on but since they changed the app to a more modern feel it’s been full of bugs, crashes, and service outages….. and price increases! Why does the app need 6 seconds after scanning a barcode in the meal tracking now before you can do anything like change the weight? Why don’t you add in what your coaches keep asking for like decimal points in the top 4 macros when adding a new custom item to the food library? Looking at Kahunas as a replacement for our business."
            3. _UtopiaS_, Jun 25, 2026, 3/5: "New update has rendered the app unstable. It crashes during workouts and the interaction with the watch app is now confusing and results in over-recording of calories. Please fix."

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 15, 2026 - Jun 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _jdifikdjjshd_, Jun 15, 2026, 1/5: "This is the most expensive app I have on my phone since I pay for it through my fitness coach. I have more issues with this app than any other app on my phone and it’s completely unacceptable due to the cost of it. Every single workout, I have connectivity issues at some point. The workouts won’t load and it literally ruins my workout experience. The fact that I noticed there are connectivity issues when I’m only using the app to work out maybe an hour a day shows that you guys have significant issues with this app whether you want to admit it or not. It’s completely ridiculous and unacceptable. My phone functions as well as every other app when I’m having issues with this one so it’s 100% your app. Do better for the price people pay for it."

### Fitbod Workout & Gym Planner {#review-app-11}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jan 24, 2026 - Apr 25, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _mo4958589594_, Jan 24, 2026, 2/5: "The app has so much potential but is so broken. It alerts me on the wrong days, it does a ludicrous amount of reps and weight for where I’m at in my fitness ability, it will give me 6 exercises for my biceps in one day when my split is meant to be full body every work out. It COULD be great, but it’s not there. I won’t be renewing my subscription"

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      4 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Feb 27, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _amluebs_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "I signed up for a free trial and then agreed to the $8.99 per month plan… I decided to cancel to save money before the trial was over and they billed me $100! There is no phone support it is all AI.. do not trust them"

### LADDER Strength Training Plans {#review-app-15}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 30, 2026 - Jul 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _ChristianaDH_, Jul 20, 2026, 4/5: "This app has honestly been life-changing. I’ve tried countless workout programs over the years, and nothing has kept me as consistent, motivated, and excited to work out as Ladder. The programming is incredible, the coaches are fantastic, and the voice-guided workouts make it so easy to stay focused without constantly looking at your phone. It’s one of the few subscriptions I’ve ever felt is worth every penny. There are only two issues I’ve run into, and I don’t think either is user error: 1. Exercise swaps and voiceover don’t stay in sync. If I swap an exercise, the video correctly changes to the new movement, but the audio coach continues giving instructions for the original exercise. For example, if I replace planks with bicycle crunches, the screen shows bicycle crunches while the coach is still explaining proper plank form. It’s not a dealbreaker, but the voiceover is one of Ladder’s best features, so I’d love to see it match the swapped exercise. 2. I can’t figure out how to cheer other members. I regularly receive cheers from teammates while I’m working out, and I even have a badge encouraging me to cheer others. However, after searching everywhere in the app, I still can’t find a way to send cheers myself. It feels like either the feature is hidden or there’s a bug. Even with those two issues, this is hands down the best fitness app I’ve ever used. It has completely changed the way I approach working out, and I highly recommend it."
            2. _DAHighton_, Jul 2, 2026, 4/5: "I thought I’d try this app after using others. It is good but, feels very Ai and does glitch a bit . It also definitely isn’t for beginners, I ended up with a really sore back from doing too much too soon ."
            3. _BexW7_, Jun 30, 2026, 5/5: "Keeps me on track. App can be glitchy at times but it’s kept me consistent."

## **Opportunities** {#opportunities}

1. Reliability as differentiation: MyFitnessPal: Diário alimentar, Strava: corre, camina, pedalea, BetterMe: Health Coaching, Fitness App (ABC Trainerize) — 51 reviews. Focus: win on stable core flows, crash-free updates, and careful regression testing.
